title: get api v1 returns api metadata
description: Test GET /api/v1 to verify it returns 200 with JSON containing version, baseUrl, endpoints, and targetFormats.

title: get api v1 health returns service status
description: Test GET /api/v1/health to verify it returns 200 with JSON containing status 'ok', version, and uptime.

title: get api v1 package name analyzes npm package
description: Test GET /api/v1/package/:name with valid package names (including scoped) to verify it returns 200 with detailed package analysis JSON.

title: get api v1 package name handles missing or invalid package
description: Test GET /api/v1/package/:name with missing name, nonexistent package, and heavy package to verify it returns 400, 404, and 500 errors respectively.

title: get api v1 repo owner repo analyzes github repo
description: Test GET /api/v1/repo/:owner/:repo with valid owner and repo, optional branch and subpath to verify it returns 200 with repo analysis JSON.

title: get api v1 repo owner repo handles error scenarios
description: Test GET /api/v1/repo/:owner/:repo with missing params, private repo, nonexistent branch, clone timeout, and no package json to verify appropriate error responses (400, 404, 408, 422).

title: get api v1 compare compares two targets
description: Test GET /api/v1/compare with valid query params a and b (npm packages or github repos) to verify it returns 200 with side-by-side comparison JSON.

title: get api v1 compare handles missing params error
description: Test GET /api/v1/compare without query params a or b to verify it returns 400 with error 'MISSING_PARAMS'.

title: get api package analyzes non scoped and scoped packages
description: Test GET /api/:package and GET /api/:scope/:package with valid package names to verify it returns 200 with analysis result JSON.

title: get badge package generates svg badge
description: Test GET /badge/:package and GET /badge/:scope/:package with valid package names and owner/repo to verify it returns 200 with SVG image content type.
